description: ol-no-value (issue #114): reproduces the spec's own worked example verbatim (spec/tooling.md:220-228) — `:doubled = map num in :nums [ print :num ]`. The comprehension body's final (only) statement is the Core command `print`, which produces no value, so the `map` cannot yield an element per iteration. `params` carry `form:"map"`. The span covers the whole comprehension (head keyword through body block). `:nums` is declared first to isolate the code.
